mapper.sql: id, org_unit_id, parent_post_id, ancestors, post_code, post_name, post_type, manager_user_id, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
mapper.select: select concat('ORG_', id) as nodeKey, id as id, case when parent_id = 0 then null else concat('ORG_', parent_id) end as parentNodeKey, org_type as nodeType, org_code as nodeCode, org_name as nodeName, status as status, id as orgUnitId, 0 as parentPostId, sort as sort, 0 as employeeCount, 0 as childPostCount from sys_org_unit order by sort asc, id asc

select concat('POST_', op.id) as nodeKey, op.id as id, case when op.parent_post_id = 0 then concat('ORG_', op.org_unit_id) else concat('POST_', op.parent_post_id) end as parentNodeKey, 'POST' as nodeType, op.post_code as nodeCode, op.post_name as nodeName, op.status as status, op.org_unit_id as orgUnitId, op.parent_post_id as parentPostId, op.sort as sort, (select count(1) from sys_user_org_post uop where uop.org_post_id = op.id and uop.status = '0') as employeeCount, (select count(1) from sys_org_post child where child.parent_post_id = op.id and child.status = '0') as childPostCount from sys_org_post op order by op.sort asc, op.id asc

select distinct ou.id as id, concat('ORG_', ou.id) as nodeKey, ou.org_code as nodeCode, ou.org_name as nodeName, ou.org_type as nodeType, ou.sort as sort from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' inner join sys_org_unit ou on ou.id = op.org_unit_id and ou.status = '0' and ou.org_type in ('HEADQUARTERS', 'BRANCH') where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0' order by ou.sort asc, ou.id asc

select op.id as id, op.org_unit_id as orgUnitId, op.parent_post_id as parentPostId, op.post_code as postCode, op.post_name as postName, op.post_type as postType, op.manager_user_id as managerUserId, coalesce(mu.nickname, mu.username) as managerName, ou.org_name as orgName, ou.org_type as orgType, case when op.parent_post_id = 0 then ou.org_name else parent.post_name end as parentNodeName, op.sort as sort, op.status as status, (select count(1) from sys_org_post child where child.parent_post_id = op.id and child.status = '0') as childPostCount, (select count(1) from sys_user_org_post uop where uop.org_post_id = op.id and uop.status = '0') as employeeCount, op.note as note from sys_org_post op left join sys_org_unit ou on op.org_unit_id = ou.id left join sys_org_post parent on op.parent_post_id = parent.id left join sys_user mu on op.manager_user_id = mu.id where op.id = #{id}

select id, parent_id as parentId, ancestors, org_code as orgCode, org_name as orgName, org_type as orgType, sort, leader_user_id as leaderUserId, status, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, note from sys_org_unit where id = #{id}

select id, parent_id as parentId, ancestors, org_code as orgCode, org_name as orgName, org_type as orgType, sort, leader_user_id as leaderUserId, status, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, note from sys_org_unit where org_code = #{orgCode} limit 1

select count(1) from sys_user where id in
#{userId}
select count(1) from sys_user_org_post where org_post_id = #{orgPostId} and status = '0'

select su.id as id, su.id as userId, su.username as username, su.nickname as nickname, su.phone as phone, su.email as email, uop.org_post_id as orgPostId, uop.primary_flag as primaryFlag, su.status as status, uop.create_time as createTime from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_user su on uop.user_id = su.id where uop.org_post_id = #{orgPostId} and uop.status = '0'
and (su.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and su.status = #{status, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}
order by uop.create_time desc, su.id desc

select su.id as id, su.id as userId, su.username as username, su.nickname as nickname, su.phone as phone, su.email as email, #{orgPostId} as orgPostId, 'N' as primaryFlag, su.status as status, su.create_time as createTime from sys_user su where not exists ( select 1 from sys_user_org_post uop where uop.user_id = su.id and uop.org_post_id = #{orgPostId} and uop.status = '0' )
and (su.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and su.status = #{status, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}
order by su.create_time desc, su.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_org_post ( id, user_id, org_post_id, primary_flag, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.orgPostId}, #{item.primaryFlag, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.status, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.note})
